However WholeReduceMax expects mask to be the number of elements per repeat (up to 64 for float, because 256/4=64). If numCols > 64, it will not work correctly. The documentation says WholeReduceMax mask maximum is 64 for float? Actually in the code snippets, mask is often 64 for float (256 bytes). So we cannot use mask = numCols directly if numCols > 64.
